description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a sturdy metal frame and angular lines. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a rich, dark brown leather or leather-like material, giving it a sophisticated and urban appearance. Draped over the left side of the chaise is a delicate, white lace or crochet throw, adding a touch of softness and contrast to the otherwise sleek structure. The armrests are flat and metallic, matching the frame and providing a geometric aesthetic. The backrest is straight and unadorned, with no visible tufting or segmentation, and the legs are simple, rectangular metal bars that extend seamlessly from the frame. The overall look is contemporary, blending industrial materials with a hint of decorative textile.
description: A modern chaise with a dark brown leather seat and backrest, set in a sleek metal frame, and accented by a white lace throw draped over one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark brown seat and backrest, with a white lace throw draped over the left side and the metal frame clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the lace throw cascading over the seat and armrest, and the angular metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backrest and the continuous metal frame, with only a small portion of the lace throw visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid brown seat and backrest, the right armrest, and the underside of the frame, with the lace throw partially visible.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, rectangular, and extends the full width of the chaise, with a smooth, unsegmented surface and no visible decorative elements or tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, constructed from flat, rectangular metal bars that match the frame and extend horizontally.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, rectangular metal bars that form a continuous part of the frame, finished in a metallic or brushed steel look with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid dark brown leather or leather-like material with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two main cushions: one for the seat and one for the backrest, both attached and seamlessly integrated into the frame, with no loose or additional cushions visible.
